Candidate.title: Candidate
Candidate.description: A candidate running for a position in the election.

name.description: The full name of the candidate.

photoUrl.description: The URL of the candidate's photo.

position.description: The position the candidate is running for.

grade.description: The grade the candidate belongs to.

number.description: The candidate's number on the ballot.

voteCount.description: The total number of votes received by the candidate.

name.description: The full name of the voter.

hasVoted.description: Whether the voter has already cast their vote.

Mesa.title: Mesa
Mesa.description: A voting station (mesa) for a specific grade.

name.description: The name of the voting station.

grade.description: The grade assigned to this voting station.

pin.description: The PIN required to access the voting station.

voterCount.description: The number of voters registered at this station.

VoteRecord.title: VoteRecord
VoteRecord.description: A record of a single vote cast.

candidateId.description: The ID of the candidate voted for.

position.description: The position the vote was cast for.

grade.description: The grade of the voter who cast the vote.

mesaId.description: The ID of the voting station where the vote was cast.

mesaName.description: The name of the voting station where the vote was cast.

voterId.description: The ID of the voter who cast the vote.

census.description: The total number of eligible voters.

sessionStatus.description: The current status of the election session.

institutionName.description: The name of the educational institution.

blancoVotes.description: The number of blank votes for each position.

AdminEmail.title: AdminEmail
AdminEmail.description: An email address authorized for administrative access.
